evidence: "The characters are so well developed and interesting, the acting is that of truly master thespians."
"nothing blues up and there are no car chases, Kung Fu fights or special effects!"
"Checked out after 10 minutes. Turned it off after 15."
"Not as dark as the trailer suggests but it is the pilot. Probably needs time for the characters to develop."
"the acting is that of truly master thespians, and the subject rife with potential for exploration - which the series has done with aplomb."
"I was in a hotel and didn't have my copy so I rented because I couldn't wait until I got home."
"Tom Hanks and Tim Allen, how can you go wrong?"
"the characters are so well developed and interesting"
"the subject is so much more interesting now than it was back in high school days."
"I wish I'd found this series sooner! It's fantastic!"
"Always enjoyable. Probably the 20th time I've watched it over the years and it never disappoints."

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented and drama genres, often favoring simple narratives with slower pacing. They appreciate well-developed characters and emotional resonance, indicating a preference for engaging storytelling over high production values.
